arts.ttl: Football transfer rumours: Liverpool make Haaland enquiry; Man Utd consider Gomes reunion
arts.sum: Liverpool and PSG have reached out to Erling Haaland over a future move, but the striker would prefer to head to Barcelona if he leaves Manchester City. Liverpool could rival Newcastle for Crystal Palace defender Marc Guehi, who seems unlikely to sign a new contract at Selhurst Park.

arts.ttl: “Now you see” – Arne Slot delighted with performance levels of Liverpool ace
arts.sum: Notwithstanding their loss to Nottingham Forest at Anfield last weekend, Arne Slot has to be happy with the way in which his start as Liverpool manager has panned out.
